overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic cyberpunk district at dusk. The player approaches a neon-lit pyramid building labeled 'Ray of Arts Club', turns onto a sidewalk, passes an NPC with green hair standing beside a yellow motorcycle, and continues toward an overpass with large digital billboards.

tall building facade covered with multiple colorful digital screens and advertisements
tall palm trees lining the street median
curved modern street light with integrated neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a wide futuristic street at dusk, approaching the illuminated Ray of Arts Club pyramid building ahead. Digital billboards cover the building to the left, and palm trees line the street. A pedestrian in red crosses the path from right to left as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with parked motorcycle and NPC interaction

approaches and passes an NPC with green hair standing beside a yellow motorcycle

pedestrian walking past the motorcycle on the sidewalk

character with distinctive green hair standing beside the motorcycle
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
elevated highway or monorail structure with metal framework spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player turns left onto a concrete sidewalk, leaving the pyramid behind. A character with green hair stands beside a striking yellow and green motorcycle. The player walks past them, with concrete barriers on the left and an overpass structure visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching overpass with construction equipment

events.description: large military truck drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continues walking down the sidewalk toward the overpass with large digital displays

pedestrian in red armor with glowing orange eyes walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large green construction excavator positioned near the overpass structure
heavy-duty military transport vehicle with dark coloring

segments.scene_description: The player continues down the sidewalk toward the overpass, passing concrete barriers and a large green construction excavator. A military truck drives past on the street to the left, while a pedestrian in red armor approaches from the right. The overpass with its digital billboards grows larger as the camera advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic district at dusk, moving from a wide boulevard toward a towering urban overpass. It begins with a forward walk down a broad street lined with palm trees, approaching the illuminated pyramid of the Ray of Arts Club as a pedestrian in red crosses the path. As the camera turns left onto a concrete sidewalk, the pyramid recedes and the view shifts to a character with green hair standing beside a vibrant yellow and green motorcycle. The scene then expands as the camera advances past concrete barriers and a large green construction excavator, while a military truck drives by on the adjacent street. Finally, the perspective pushes forward past a pedestrian in red armor, with the massive digital billboards of the looming overpass growing larger and more dominant in the frame.
